title: How to attach a form to my email being sent from Monday
excerpt: I have set up an automation that will send an email to my prospect.  Within that email, I would like to attach a form that I have created.

posts.author: Vibebhc (Michael Roberts)
posts.cookedHtml: I have set up an automation that will send an email to my prospect. Within that email, I would like to attach a form that I have created.

posts.author: Rua (Acorn)
posts.cookedHtml: You could add the link to the form in your email. No?
